description: Searches hotels, flights, and rental cars with side-by-side cash and points pricing, cents-per-point valuations, loyalty account tracking, rate alerts, and direct booking. The only travel search that shows cash and award rates together.

notes: Native MCP OAuth 2.1 with Dynamic Client Registration for hosted clients (scopes: mcp:read for trips/loyalty/profile, mcp:book for booking and rate alerts)
Static API key (Authorization: Bearer gond_...) supported as an alternative for headless clients
Hotel, flight, and rental-car search tools work anonymously; trips, loyalty, payments, and booking require authentication
